docket_entries.description: COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $358.37 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, TANYA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, TANYA $781.01 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $861.01 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED SEP-29-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, TANYA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT TANYA RODRIGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, TANYA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $781.01 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, TANYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/31/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS,LLC
